meta.title: The science of sleep
meta.sourceDoc: 94. P3 - The science of sleep 睡眠的科学.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: The science of sleep 睡眠的科学

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：C
PDF 定位：第 5 段:Professor Meir Siegel.. provides an opportunity to repair the body cells damaged during wakefulness."
PDF 解析：Siegel认为NREM睡眠为全身细胞修复提供机会，说明"整个身体都能在这种 睡眠中恢复"。

题目 28
答案：F
PDF 定位：第9段: "Michel Jouvet believes that the intense activity seen in the brain during REM sleep is essential to neural development before birth."
PDF 解析：Jouvet指出REM睡眠对生命早期（胎儿期）的脑部发育有益。

题目 29
答案：A
PDF 定位：第1段:"when you die, a bigger slice of your existence will have passed in this state (sleep) than in ... any other activity."
PDF 解析：PaulMartin明确表示人一生中花在睡眠上的时间比任何其他活动都多。

题目 30
答案：D
PDF 定位：第 6段:"The functions of NREM sleep have probably changed with evolution, maybe beginning as an energy conserver...
PDF 解析：JimHorne认为NREM睡眠的功能随时间演变。

题目 31
答案：B
PDF 定位：第 3段: Kleitman... noticed it was marked by periods of rapid eye movement... accompanied by a frenzy of brain activity akin to that seen during wakefulness.
PDF 解析：NathanielKleitman发现REM睡眠的大脑活动与清醒时相似。

题目 32
答案：E
PDF 定位：第7段："According to Dr Claudio, when we are deprived of REM sleep, memorv consolidation is compromised."
PDF 解析：ClaudioStampi指出REM睡眠有助于把经历'重新处理'成可用信息，即从经 验中学习。

questionSections.text:
题目 33
答案：breathing / eating
PDF 定位：第1段：: "Unlike breathing or eating, the biological benefits of sleep are not immediately obvious."
PDF 解析：睡眠的生理优势不像呼吸那样显而易见。只需填其中一个示例即可。

题目 34
答案：babies
PDF 定位：第 2 段: "Like us, other animals... sleep more as babies."
PDF 解析：多数动物在幼年时期睡得更久。

题目 35
答案：brain activity
PDF 定位：第 3 段:"scientists assumed it was a passive state in which brain activity ceased."
PDF 解析：早先科学家认为睡眠时大脑活动停止。

题目 36
答案：(vigorous) exercise
PDF 定位：第 5 段: "it has been shown that NREM sleep does indeed increase after vigorous exercise."
PDF 解析：证实运动会提升NREM睡眠时长。

题目 37
答案：temperature
PDF 定位：第 5 段: "The decrease both in metabolic rate and in brain temperature occurring during NREM sleep...
PDF 解析：NREM睡眠期间，大脑的温度降低。

题目 38
答案：scanning techniques
PDF 定位：第 10 段:"as scanning techniques become more refined, the brain regions .. will be better understood.
PDF 解析：REM之谜有望随着扫描技术改进而揭晓。

题目 39
答案：drug
PDF 定位：第 10 段: "it's highly improbable that any new drug could enable us to avoid it....
PDF 解析：作者认为不太可能有任何药物可替代睡眠。

questionSections.text:
题目 40
答案：D
PDF 定位/解析：全文 文章围绕NREM与REM两种睡眠的差异（起源、功能、脑活动、对记忆或身体的影响等）展开，对比并讨论各自的研究发现与未解之谜，故选 Describe the differences between two tvpes of sleeD.
